Time and attendance records

The UKG Pro HCM API provides programmatic access to human capital management data including employees, personnel actions, benefits, payroll, performance, and organizational structure. Supports REST-based web services with Basic Authentication and API key authorization, enabling integrations with HR systems, payroll processors, benefits administrators, and analytics platforms. Base URL for US tenants is https://service.ultipro.com.
